AboutPage.heroSubtitleMobile: ResumeCraftor was founded in 2026 to simplify professional design.
AboutPage.heroSubtitleDesktop: ResumeCraftor was founded in 2026 to remove complexity from professional design. We build tools that help people create clean, accurate, and modern documents without wasting time on formatting.
AboutPage.storyParagraph1: ResumeCraftor started as a small internal project focused on making professional documents easy to create and reliable. It has since grown into a resume-building platform.
AboutPage.storyParagraph2: From resumes and cover letters to layouts and export options, each feature is designed to support clear and consistent document creation.
AboutPage.storyCta: Ready to get started? You can <templatesLink>browse our resume templates</templatesLink> or <guidesLink>read our resume writing guides</guidesLink> to learn more.
AboutPage.principlesParagraph1: We focus on speed, precision, and trust. The editor reacts instantly, templates follow strict formatting rules, and user data is protected by default. No unnecessary features, no distractions — only tools that help you get results.
AboutPage.principlesParagraph2: ResumeCraftor is built for people who care about details and want their work to speak for itself.
AboutPage.teamParagraph1: We are a distributed team of engineers and designers working across multiple time zones. This allows us to move fast, stay close to our users, and continuously improve the product.
AboutPage.teamParagraph2: Our background spans product design, frontend engineering, and infrastructure — all focused on building reliable software for everyday professional use.
AboutPage.ctaTitle: Build something you’re proud to share

CoverLetterBuilderPage.heroDescription: Pair the right resume with a cover letter that actually gets read. Our free cover letter builder walks you through a proven structure, helps you tailor every paragraph to the job description, and keeps the formatting clean so it sails through applicant tracking systems. Write a confident, professional letter in minutes, not hours.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.whyParagraph1: Your resume lists what you have done; your cover letter explains why it matters for this specific role. It is the one place where you can connect the dots between your experience and the problems a company is trying to solve, in your own voice. A strong letter turns a stack of bullet points into a story a hiring manager can picture.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.whyParagraph2: Many candidates skip the cover letter or paste in a generic template, which means a thoughtful, tailored letter instantly stands out. When two applicants have similar resumes, the one who clearly understands the role and articulates their fit is far more likely to land the interview.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.whyParagraph3: A cover letter also gives you room to address things a resume cannot: a career change, a relocation, a gap in employment, or genuine enthusiasm for the company's mission. Used well, it reassures the reader and removes doubts before they become reasons to pass.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.stepsTitle: How to write a cover letter in 4 steps
CoverLetterBuilderPage.step1Title: Research the role and the company
CoverLetterBuilderPage.step1Desc: Read the job description closely and note the top three or four responsibilities and required skills. Look at the company's website to understand its priorities so you can speak directly to what they care about.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.step2Title: Open with a specific, confident hook
CoverLetterBuilderPage.step2Desc: Name the role and the company, then lead with the single most relevant reason you are a strong fit. Skip 'To whom it may concern' and 'I am writing to apply'; start with a result or a point of genuine interest instead.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.step3Desc: In one or two body paragraphs, match your experience to the role's needs using concrete, measurable results. Quantify impact where you can, and mirror a few exact keywords from the posting so your relevance is obvious.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.step4Title: Close with a clear call to action
CoverLetterBuilderPage.step4Desc: Restate your enthusiasm in a sentence, thank the reader, and invite the next step, such as an interview. Keep it brief, confident, and free of typos before you export and send.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.includeIntro: Every effective cover letter follows the same skeleton. Use this checklist to make sure yours has each essential part before you send it.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.includeHeaderDetail: Your name and contact details at the top, the date, and a greeting addressed to a named hiring manager whenever you can find one.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.includeOpeningDetail: A first line that names the role, signals your fit, and gives the reader a reason to keep going.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.includeBodyDetail: One or two paragraphs that connect your most relevant, measurable accomplishments to the responsibilities in the job description.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.includeClosingDetail: A confident sign-off that reiterates your interest, thanks the reader, and invites the next step, followed by a professional closing line.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipsTitle: Cover letter tips that get interviews
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipTailorLabel: Tailor it to the job description.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipTailorText: Treat each posting as a checklist. Identify the core requirements and address them directly, using the same language the employer used so your relevance is impossible to miss.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipAtsText: Use a clean, single-column layout with standard fonts and headings. Avoid tables, graphics, and text boxes that automated systems struggle to parse, and include a few exact keywords from the posting so you rank as a match.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipResultsText: Quantify your impact wherever possible. "Cut onboarding time by 30%" lands far harder than "responsible for onboarding," and numbers give the reader something concrete to remember.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipMatchLabel: Match your cover letter to your resume.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipMatchText: Use the same name, contact details, and visual style across both documents. Browse our <link>resume templates</link> to keep your application consistent and polished.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipShortLabel: Keep it short and proofread it twice.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipShortText: Stay on one page, cut filler, and read your letter aloud to catch awkward phrasing. A single typo can undo an otherwise excellent application, so review carefully before you send.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.tipExamplesText: Our <link>career blog</link> breaks down sample letters, ATS strategies, and resume tips you can apply right away.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq1Question: Is the cover letter builder really free?
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq1Answer: Yes. You can structure, write, and refine your cover letter at no cost. Start from the resume builder, follow the guided sections, and export your document when it is ready to send.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq2Question: How long should a cover letter be?
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq2Answer: Keep it to a single page, typically three to four short paragraphs and around 250 to 400 words. Hiring managers skim, so a focused letter that highlights two or three relevant achievements outperforms a long, generic one.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq3Question: Do I need a different cover letter for every job?
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq3Answer: You should tailor each letter to the specific role. Reuse your core structure, but swap in the company name, the position, and one or two achievements that match the keywords in the job description. A tailored letter signals genuine interest and ranks better in applicant tracking systems.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq4Question: Will my cover letter pass an ATS?
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq4Answer: It will if you keep the formatting clean. Use standard headings, avoid tables, images, and text boxes, save as a PDF unless told otherwise, and mirror a few exact phrases from the job posting so the system recognizes you as a relevant match.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq5Question: What should I do if I have no direct experience?
CoverLetterBuilderPage.faq5Answer: Lead with transferable skills and measurable results from school, internships, volunteering, or side projects. Show how those experiences map to the responsibilities in the posting, and express clear enthusiasm for learning the role.
CoverLetterBuilderPage.ctaTitle: Ready to Write a Cover Letter That Gets Interviews?
CoverLetterBuilderPage.ctaDescription: Build a tailored, ATS-friendly cover letter and matching resume in minutes with ResumeCraftor.

PrivacyPolicyPage.intro: ResumeCraftor is operated by the ResumeCraftor team and provided as an independent online service.
PrivacyPolicyPage.commitment: At ResumeCraftor, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.
PrivacyPolicyPage.collectIntro: We collect and process the following types of personal information:
PrivacyPolicyPage.collectAccount: Account Information: Name, email address, password, and profile details
PrivacyPolicyPage.collectResume: Resume Content: Employment history, education, skills, and other information you provide in your documents
PrivacyPolicyPage.collectUsage: Usage Data: Information about how you use our platform, including IP address, browser type, device information, and usage patterns
PrivacyPolicyPage.collectPayment: Payment Information: Payment card details and billing information (processed securely through third-party payment processors)
PrivacyPolicyPage.collectCommunications: Communications: Emails, messages, and feedback you send to us
PrivacyPolicyPage.useIntro: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
PrivacyPolicyPage.useProvide: To provide and maintain our resume building services
PrivacyPolicyPage.useDocuments: To create, edit, save, and export your documents
PrivacyPolicyPage.useAuthenticate: To authenticate your account and prevent fraud
PrivacyPolicyPage.usePayments: To process payments and manage subscriptions
PrivacyPolicyPage.useNotifications: To send you service-related notifications and updates
PrivacyPolicyPage.useImprove: To improve our platform and develop new features
PrivacyPolicyPage.useSupport: To provide customer support and respond to your inquiries
PrivacyPolicyPage.useMarketing: To send marketing communications (with your consent)
PrivacyPolicyPage.useLegal: To comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms
PrivacyPolicyPage.legalBasisIntro: We process your personal data under the following legal bases:
PrivacyPolicyPage.legalContract: Contract Performance: Processing necessary to provide our services to you
PrivacyPolicyPage.legalConsent: Consent: Where you have given us permission for specific purposes
PrivacyPolicyPage.legalInterests: Legitimate Interests: For improving our services, preventing fraud, and direct marketing
PrivacyPolicyPage.legalObligations: Legal Obligations: To comply with applicable laws and regulations
PrivacyPolicyPage.sharingIntro: We may share your information with:
PrivacyPolicyPage.sharingProviders: Service Providers: Third-party vendors who assist in providing our services (e.g., hosting, analytics, payment processing)
PrivacyPolicyPage.sharingTransfers: Business Transfers: In connection with any merger, acquisition, or sale of company assets
PrivacyPolicyPage.sharingLegal: Legal Requirements: When required by law or to protect our rights and safety
PrivacyPolicyPage.sharingConsent: With Your Consent: When you explicitly authorize us to share your information
PrivacyPolicyPage.sharingNoSell: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
PrivacyPolicyPage.retentionBody: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy. Account information and resume data are stored while your account is active and for a limited period thereafter, unless a longer retention period is required by law. You can request deletion of your data at any time.
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsIntro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsAccess: Access: Request a copy of your personal data
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsRectification: Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsErasure: Erasure: Request deletion of your personal data
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsRestriction: Restriction: Request limitation of processing of your data
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsPortability: Data Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsObjection: Objection: Object to processing of your data for certain purposes
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsWithdraw: Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent at any time where we rely on consent
PrivacyPolicyPage.rightsComplain: Complain: Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority
PrivacyPolicyPage.securityBody: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption, secure servers, regular security assessments, and access controls. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
PrivacyPolicyPage.cookiesIntro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:
PrivacyPolicyPage.cookiesSession: Maintain your session and keep you logged in
PrivacyPolicyPage.cookiesAnalyze: Analyze usage patterns and improve our services
PrivacyPolicyPage.cookiesControl: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our platform.
PrivacyPolicyPage.cookiesAdvertising: We may use third-party advertising services, including Google AdSense, to display ads on our website. These services may use cookies or similar technologies to serve ads based on users’ visits to this and other websites. Users may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting <link>Google’s Ads Settings</link>.
PrivacyPolicyPage.thirdPartyBody: Our platform may integrate with third-party services such as analytics providers, payment processors, and cloud storage services. These third parties have their own privacy policies, and we recommend reviewing them. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party services.
PrivacyPolicyPage.transfersBody: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure that such transfers comply with applicable data protection laws and implement appropriate safeguards, such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
PrivacyPolicyPage.childrenBody: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us, and we will take steps to delete such information.
PrivacyPolicyPage.changesBody: We may update this privacy policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
PrivacyPolicyPage.contactIntro: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us at:
PrivacyPolicyPage.compliance: This privacy policy is compliant with GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation), CCPA (California Consumer Privacy Act), and other applicable data protection laws. We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data responsibly.

ResumeBuilderPage.srDescription: ResumeCraftor is a free online resume and CV builder that helps you create a professional, ATS-optimized resume in minutes. Start from a <templatesLink>professional resume template</templatesLink>, customize every section with an intuitive drag-and-drop editor, and export a polished PDF. New to resumes? Read our <blogLink>resume writing and ATS guides</blogLink>.

ResumeExamplesPage.heroDescription: Find role-specific guidance for your next application. Each guide includes tailored tips, ATS keywords, and free, ATS-friendly templates so you can build a resume that fits your job.
ResumeExamplesPage.internalLinks: You can also <templatesLink>browse all resume templates</templatesLink> or read our <blogLink>resume writing guides</blogLink>.

TemplatesIndexPage.srDescription: Choose from a library of free, ATS-friendly resume templates designed for every career stage — from student and entry-level resumes to senior, executive, and creative roles. Every ResumeCraftor template uses clean, single-column-friendly formatting that applicant tracking systems can parse, and you can customize colors, fonts, and layout in minutes before exporting a polished PDF.

TemplatesPage.heroDescription: Choose from our curated collection of industry-standard templates. Each template is designed with ATS compatibility in mind and follows clean, professional formatting standards.
TemplatesPage.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.
TemplatesPage.seoDescription: Our resume templates are designed to balance visual clarity and structural simplicity. Clean layouts, readable typography, and standardized sections help ensure compatibility with common applicant tracking systems while maintaining a professional appearance.
TemplatesPage.deleteModalDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action is permanent and will remove it for everyone.

TermsOfServicePage.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using ResumeCraftor.
TermsOfServicePage.howToUseIntro: ResumeCraftor is designed to be intuitive and easy to use. Here are the basic rules for using our platform:
TermsOfServicePage.howToUseCreateAccount: **Create an Account:** While you can try the editor as a guest, we recommend creating an account to save your progress and access all features.
TermsOfServicePage.howToUseCopyright: **Respect Copyright:** improved content templates are provided for your personal use. Do not redistribute or sell our templates or designs as your own.
TermsOfServicePage.howToUseAccurate: **Accurate Information:** You agree to provide accurate and truthful information in your resumes and CVs. We are not responsible for any consequences resulting from false information.
TermsOfServicePage.howToUsePersonal: **Personal Use Only:** Our free service is intended for individual resume and CV creation. Commercial redistribution or resale of templates or generated documents is not permitted.
TermsOfServicePage.riskWarningIntro: Please be aware of the following risks when using any online resume builder, including ResumeCraftor:
TermsOfServicePage.riskDataPrivacy: **Data Privacy:** While we implement strong security measures, no online service is 100% secure. Avoid including highly sensitive personal information (like social security numbers or bank details) in your resume drafts.
TermsOfServicePage.riskJobOutcomes: **Job Application Outcomes:** We provide tools to create professional resumes, but we explicitly **do not guarantee** that using our service will result in job offers, interviews, or employment. Employment decisions are solely at the discretion of employers.
TermsOfServicePage.riskAts: **ATS Compatibility:** While we strive for high ATS (Applicant Tracking System) compatibility, ATS software varies widely and we cannot guarantee 100% parsing accuracy on every single system.
TermsOfServicePage.serviceModelIntro: ResumeCraftor is committed to providing a powerful free tool for job seekers. To sustain our operations and keep the core features free, please note:
TermsOfServicePage.serviceModelFree: **Free to Use:** The core resume building functionality is free of charge.
TermsOfServicePage.serviceModelAdSupported: **Ad-Supported:** Our website may display third-party advertisements. These ads help cover our server and development costs.
TermsOfServicePage.serviceModelPartners: **Partner Promotions:** We may occasionally feature promotional offers from our partners (e.g., career coaching services, job boards). These will be clearly identified.
TermsOfServicePage.acceptanceBody: By accessing and using this service, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this service.
TermsOfServicePage.contactIntro: If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms, please contact us at:
